title: More Nonsense Limerick 49
content:
There was an old man on the Border,
    Who lived in the utmost disorder;
    He danced with the cat, 
    And made tea in his hat,
    Which vexed all the folks on the Border.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "More Nonsense Limerick 49", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
